24:I[766,["/_next/static/chunks/14iy9u_bz-pgx.js","/_next/static/chunks/0cxg64m_kli2i.js"],"MetadataBoundary"]
6:["$","h2",null,{"children":"What Sleep Does"}]
7:["$","p",null,{"children":"During each sleep cycle, Mnemosyne:"}]
8:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Scans"}]," Working Memory for consolidation candidates"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Ranks"}]," entries by importance, recency, and access patterns"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Promotes"}]," high-value entries to Episodic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Extracts"}]," structured facts for Semantic Memory"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compresses"}]," related entries using AAAK"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Evicts"}]," entries that exceed retention limits"]}],"\n"]}]
9:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Trigger Conditions"}]
a:["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep cycles trigger on:"}]
b:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Time interval"}],": Every ",["$","code",null,{"children":"consolidation_interval"}]," seconds (default: 3600)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Capacity pressure"}],": When Working Memory reaches 80% of max"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Explicit call"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mem.sleep()"}]," for manual consolidation"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Shutdown"}],": Graceful process exit"]}],"\n"]}]
c:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}]
d:["$","$L1b",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  A[Working Memory] -->|scan| B[Candidate Selection]\n  B -->|importance > 0.7| C[Promote to Episodic]\n  B -->|extractable| D[Extract Facts]\n  B -->|age > 7d| E[Evict]\n  C -->|compress| F[AAAK Compression]\n  F --> G[Episodic Memory]\n  D --> H[Temporal Graph]\n  E --> I[Delete]\n"}]
e:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}]
f:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\nmem = Memory(\n  consolidation_interval=1800,  # 30 minutes\n  working_max=500,\n  eviction_policy=\"lru_importance\",  # or \"fifo\", \"random\"\n)\n\n# Manual sleep\nmem.sleep()\n","language":"python"}]
10:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Retention Policies"}]
11:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Policy"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Behavior"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Use Case"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"lru_importance"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Evict least-recently used, weighted by importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"General purpose"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"fifo"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"First-in, first-out"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Streaming data"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"random"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Random eviction"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Testing only"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"importance_only"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Evict lowest importance"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Quality-focused"}]]}]]}]]}]
12:["$","h2",null,{"children":"Monitoring Consolidation"}]
13:["$","$L1c",null,{"code":"stats = mem.stats()\nprint(f\"Last sleep: {stats.last_sleep_at}\")\nprint(f\"Consolidated: {stats.consolidated_count}\")\nprint(f\"Evicted: {stats.evicted_count}\")\nprint(f\"Extracted facts: {stats.extracted_facts_count}\")\n","language":"python"}]
14:["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L1d",null,{"ref":"$undefined","iconNode":[["circle",{"cx":"12","cy":"12","r":"10","key":"1mglay"}],["path",{"d":"M12 16v-4","key":"1dtifu"}],["path",{"d":"M12 8h.01","key":"e9boi3"}]],"className":"lucide-info shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Performance Impact"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Sleep consolidation runs in a background thread and does not block agent operations. On typical hardware, a full cycle processes ~1000 entries in under 5 seconds."}]}]]}]]}]}]
